---
title: Quiberon
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061322/quiberon_nbpjit.png
description: Quiberon
categories: ["miscellaneous"]
date: 2024-10-24
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061322/quiberon_nbpjit.png)
